name: Wizebuys PawnBrokers Outlet
description_short: Wizebuys PawnBrokers Outlet is a Highland Township, MI pawn shop specializing in fine jewelry, electronics, and collectibles with knowledgeable staff and competitive pricing.
description_long:
Wizebuys PawnBrokers Outlet operates as a local pawn broker in Highland Township, Michigan, serving Oakland County and surrounding areas. The business is positioned as a well-established community resource for buying, selling, and pawning items of value. Based on aggregated customer feedback and business listing information, the outlet has developed a reputation within its local market.

The company offers a diverse range of services and products centered on pawn and resale transactions. Their inventory includes fine jewelry pieces, guitars, gaming consoles, electronics, and other collectibles. The business accepts used goods and provides onsite services for transactions. Payment options include debit cards and NFC mobile payments. The shop operates Monday through Friday from 10:00 AM to 6:30 PM, with Saturday hours from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM, and is closed on Sundays.

Wizebuys distinguishes itself through customer service emphasis, with reviews highlighting knowledgeable and friendly staff who assist with negotiations and product selection. Customers note fair and competitive pricing compared to other pawn shops and online alternatives. The store maintains a clean environment and offers a varied selection of unique items, which appeals to customers seeking both bargains and distinctive collectibles. In-store shopping is available, with delivery options also noted as a service offering.

The business has received an aggregate rating of 8.4/10 ("Very good") with specific category scores: Customer Service 9.5, Quality 9.0, Product Variety 8.5, Price 8.0, Payment Options 8.0, and Location 7.5. However, the business has not yet completed owner verification on the platform. Customer feedback indicates some experiences with pricing inconsistencies or lowball offers on certain items like electronics or firearms, suggesting negotiation variance depending on item type and condition.
address: 2928 E Highland Rd, Highland Township, MI 48356

pros: Exceptionally high customer service rating (9.5/10) with staff noted as friendly, knowledgeable, and patient during negotiations
Strong quality ratings (9.0/10) for jewelry and merchandise condition, appealing to customers seeking reliable goods
Competitive and fair pricing compared to other pawn shops, with customers reporting good deals on both purchases and sales
Diverse product variety including fine jewelry, guitars, electronics, and gaming consoles catering to multiple customer interests
Clean, professional store environment that enhances shopping experience
Multiple payment options including debit cards and NFC mobile payments for customer convenience
Located with convenient access at 2928 E Highland Rd, Highland Township, MI with extended weekday hours (10 AM - 6:30 PM)
cons: Business has not completed owner verification on listing platform, raising transparency questions
Customer feedback indicates pricing inconsistencies and lowball offers on certain items (electronics, firearms), suggesting variable valuation practices
No information available regarding financing options, payment plans, or loan terms despite pawn-shop category
Limited online presence and no information about digital services, appointment scheduling, or remote valuation
Closed Sundays, limiting accessibility for weekend shoppers
best_for: Local customers seeking to buy, sell, or pawn fine jewelry with personalized service and fair market pricing
Collectors and enthusiasts looking for unique items (guitars, gaming consoles, electronics) at discounted prices
Individuals needing quick cash through collateral-based loans with minimal documentation
diagnosis: Wizebuys is best for local Highland Township residents and Oakland County shoppers seeking collateral-based loans or quality used merchandise, particularly fine jewelry and electronics, with staff-assisted negotiations. Primary caveat: pricing appears inconsistent across item categories (strong on jewelry, variable on electronics/firearms), and the unverified business status warrants direct contact to confirm current operations and specific loan terms before visiting.
services: Buying used goods (jewelry, electronics, collectibles, guitars)
Selling items through consignment or outright purchase
